title: ナリタブライアン登場！

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sooo... thirsty.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
My lips are dry, puckered and flaky. Yet, even in
such a state, my body continues to breathe. It
longs to be quenched.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And that is an act of survival... even if it causes me to thirst.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hence, I continue to fill my lungs with air, in
hopes that one day... I'll be sated.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to Tracen Academy. It may just satisfy that
hunger of yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My desire to run—to survive.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...The time has finally come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Narita Brian and I are about to enter
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A stupid question.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to go warm up first. I'll see you at the
track in a bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By track, I'm guessing she means the training
track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I get ready quickly and follow her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time I get my stuff together and step out
into the hallway, she's already gone.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: That must be the trainer working with Brian.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I hear Brian's finally making her debut. Her sister, Biwa
Hayahide, has been performing well in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I hear she may have the potential to even surpass her
sister. She could be the Triple Crown Champion—even
outperforming Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Intriguing... She seems to be at the center of
everyone's attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Symboli Rudolf—the renowned Tracen Academy
student council president. She's a prestigious
figure, being a Triple Crown Champion and the
object of everyone's admiration.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian. She's capable of creating a
one-of-a-kind future for herself through her
running. It's for that reason that I've appointed
her vice president.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I hear she's already amassed some
enthusiastic fans. There are even those looking to
compare my records with her yet-to-be-seen
ones.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That only shows how high everyone's
expectations are—my own included.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm very much looking forward to seeing the kind
of runner you will guide Brian to be.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And what Brian will hold on to as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Too slow.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gah, no way!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Turbo... Engine... En... gine... puuushhh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I warmed up. ...With a race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If it doesn't get my blood pumping, it's
meaningless. That's why I wanted a partner for my
warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But it's not enough... I'm not satiated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Any volunteers?

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: (Yikes!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No one?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, are you sure you still want to race her? Twin
Turbo is the third one she's beaten.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
N-no way! I can't run with someone like that. I'm
scared...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Why don't we move on to training?
Why don't we move on to training?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch... How dull. It's only a race if you have an
opponent.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.
choice_data_list:
Once you make your debut, you'll have more
than enough opponents to race.

Once you make your debut, you'll have more
than enough opponents to race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Because it's the Twinkle Series?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thaaat's right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hah! We're not just gonna let things finish like
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Hishi Amazon—dorm leader of Miho Dormitory.
She's known for her strength and generosity, and
is often called the Queen of the Amazons.)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Brian, come here a sec! Let's do one lap around
the turf track, you and me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll make you taste the bitterness of defeat!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Color me interested!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We will... after we're finished!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ha... Haha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
A taste of the Twinkle Series... I'm going to savor
it to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins my time with Narita Brian, the
racer eager to run to the ends of the earth.
